items.title: West Asia war LIVE: UN agency says it pauses Hormuz ship evacuation initiative after vessel attacked

items.title: Hoping for Miracles as Venezuela Digs Out From Massive Quakes
items.summary: It is known as a “doublet,” two earthquakes in quick succession, and it has brought the Latin American country to its knees.

items.title: Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
